name: humanize
description: Rewrite or audit prose so it sounds natural in the right register. Use for AI-assisted text, READMEs, docs, emails, posts, and copy that feels generic, robotic, or machine-written. Also triggers on de-slop and de-slopify.

interface.shortDescription: Rewrite or audit prose so it sounds natural in the right register.
interface.longDescription: Rewrite or audit prose so it sounds natural in the right register. Use for AI-assisted text, READMEs, docs, emails, posts, and copy that feels generic, robotic, or machine-written. Also triggers on de-slop and de-slopify.
